title: Marketplace Manager - Nike India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Nike India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Nike India! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Navi Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Nike India:
Nike India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nike India!
